title: Valid Claim Signature — c2pa.created Action
description: Verifies that a conformant validator correctly reports a valid claim signature for an asset signed with a c2pa.created action and a digitalSourceType. The signing certificate is self-signed (not on the C2PA Trust List), so signingCredential.untrusted is expected when trust-list validation is enabled.

validationStatus.explanation: The claim signature must be cryptographically valid for an unmodified, correctly signed asset.
